name: Mogzu — Vendor Registration Onboarding

parameters.subject: Welcome to Mogzu — Complete your vendor setup
parameters.message:
Welcome, {{ $json.record.business_name }}!

Your vendor account is under review. Here's what to do next:

  1. Upload business documents (GST certificate, PAN)
  2. Add your first listing
  3. Set your availability calendar
  4. Connect your bank account for payouts

Our team will review and activate your account within 2 business days.

— Mogzu Onboarding Team

parameters.subject: New vendor pending review: {{ $node['Webhook: Vendor Registered'].json.record.business_name }}
